storyInfo: After falling under the mistaken impression that Rhodes Island is firing her, Pinecone resolves to form her own work team. Even once the misunderstanding is cleared up, she remains set on doing so. She is a grown worker now, with a new path to walk.

attributes.content: Ederson, uh, sorry, I got to the cafeteria late an' there wasn't much left on the breakfast menu. These are all I got.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: It's okay, Mina. Don't worry about it.
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: Oh, did you hand my resume in? What did they say, the Engineering? Gonna be coworkers real soon, right, you and I?
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: Well...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: What? I don't get why you're giving me that look...
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: Di... Did I get rejected?
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: Mina, you were supposed to tell 'em we're from the same town! I came here just to crash with you! My background's spotless! I'm not some shady nobody!
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: I grew up around work sites! I practically lived with the site workers! I lay bricks, I stand beams, I take measurements, I rig scaffolding... I do it all! Hell, Rhodes could try me for a while, for free...
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: Ederson. We'll head back in two days. To Columbia.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: We?
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: *hic*... They cut me too.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: So... Pinecone's gotta leave.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: When?
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: ASAP, really.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: Just like that?
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: Just like that.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: *sniff*...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: B-But... why would they wanna fire you?
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: You said in all your letters, right? Your dad always showed 'em to us! All like, you'd never dreamed you could work at a place like Rhodes Island, right? Good benefits, good pay, a place where people are people...
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: Yes, but Rhodes Island is still a company.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Sometimes it needs workers, sometimes it doesn't. We know how it works. It's the same story all over Columbia.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: (Wiping tears) C'mon, Ederson. You eat breakfast, I'm goin' to work. Bridge overhaul's down to the wire. Engineering could use my hands today.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Mina, doesn't it make you mad? You don't have to take this from them...
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: Not like Rhodes treated me badly while I was here.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: And besides, it's my job. I'm gonna finish it.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: I need to find Kafka and straighten things out anyhow...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Kafka!
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Hey, Mina!
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: Sheesh, talk about puffy eyes. You sleeping bad? Hey, c'mon, cheer up... Oh, uh, I gotta see Aciddrop about a thing, I'll catch ya on the flippy.
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: You—you...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Whassamatter?
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: You don't got stuff you wanna say to me?
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Uh, later I will, alright, Mina? Just gimme a li'l bit...
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: Just wanted to say you don't gotta worry about—
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Hey, Mina, you gonna stand there all day?
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: Coming.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: You've got your nailgun and nothing else on you? You leave your toolbag in the dorms again?
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: Uh, sorry, I...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: I got distracted when I left.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: This is far from the first time, you know.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: Just last week you left your spare batteries on site in the training grounds, and only remembered right before the grounds were closing down. The whole ship watched you run back panting and wheezing...
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: If it's not this, it's that. If it's not that, it's something else. We remember it all!
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: (So that's why...)
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: (You dummy, Mina. Nobody likes a klutz...)
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Alright, just use my toolbag for now.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: Lemme double-check the assignment logs. You're handling the left side, I'm handling the right, and we need to finish servicing the whole bridge by today.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: Why the rush?
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: After this, we've gotta run maintenance on the middle decks, the lower decks, and critical areas like the ship's Catastrophe warning system and mining modules. We're doing as much prep as we can before we break the whole ship up.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: B—Break the whole ship up?
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: We're just taking the whole landship and...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: I was wondering why everyone seemed so busy lately...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: What's on your mind?
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: I understand.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: When I was young, Dad told me, Mina, every day Columbia gives birth to countless new companies and construction teams, but the number of 'em hasn't changed much...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: I didn't know what he meant at the time, but when I grew up and started roving from one work team to another, I started to understand.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: The land's ruthless. Companies are just as fragile as people.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: I can't say I know where this is coming from... Eh, well, it's beyond me. Engineering only got the order not long ago, so let's just knuckle down and finish this last job, Pinecone.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: Oh, and once you clock out today, remember to go through the logs at Engineering.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: No wonder there's layoffs... And Rhodes Island was such a nice place...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Come on, Mina. Not like you can do anything about it...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Hi. The bridge is all serviced. I'm here to check the assignment logs for this period.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Oh, Pinecone. Could you wait a sec? Just give us a moment to finish up on this task.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator B

attributes.content: ...Sure.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Is that all of them?
attributes.name: Engineering Operator B

attributes.content: Yup.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator C

attributes.content: Let's see...
attributes.name: Engineering Operator B

attributes.content: Notices of Approval from the Columbian Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Arts Units, and Originium; the registration for our collaboration with Rhine Lab in the pharmaceutical industry; and registrations for other partnerships in the energy sector...
attributes.name: Engineering Operator B

attributes.content: The thickest file here is on Rim Billiton... Rhodes has dozens of high-risk mining operations in Billy under its belt thanks to us at Engineering and some individually named operators.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator B

attributes.content: The Victorian stuff is over there... Leithanien... Kazimierz...
attributes.name: Engineering Operator B

attributes.content: You know, Engineering's literally never been busier. Are we really meant to just sit here sifting through old documents instead of helping the others out with the ship?
attributes.name: Engineering Operator C

attributes.content: This is important work too, friend.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator B

attributes.content: If you say so...
attributes.name: Engineering Operator C

attributes.content: Once the ship's dismantled, our branch offices are gonna get a whole lot busier.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator B

attributes.content: These documents aren't just souvenirs from where we've been and what we've done.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator B

attributes.content: They can prove to others, and to ourselves, what we can do.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator B

attributes.content: ...You're right.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator C

attributes.content: Oh, Pinecone, I signed off on your assignment logs for you.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator C

attributes.content: Thanks.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Could I... could I, uh, ask you a favor?
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: What do you need?
attributes.name: Engineering Operator C

attributes.content: I'd like to obtain every assignment log of mine since I began employment here.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Mina! You're back. Finally.
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: Mm-hmm.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: You hash things out with 'em?
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: Nope.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Ederson, there's been a wrench in the works. I—I don't really know best how to explain...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Well, what's happening to you? What happens with us?
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: Mina, you're one of the strongest people I've ever known. Always have been.
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: You made it through your dad's accident, you made it through your family's whole thing. I heard you even helped out the Simons' boy at Mansfield State Prison...
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: You had to flee the country, you had to come all the way out here, and you still found a great job. But in the end, you're just gonna... go on back to Columbia?
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: The Pioneer project pushed our town out even further away from the nomadic cities. It's a dead-end back there, I'm telling you. Plus the whole business with Mr. Simon and your dad...
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: And our old foremen and our old bosses. And whatever else might trip us up.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: ...I know. I know.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: And that's it? You're just gonna go from one site to the next, begging your way through life one employer at a time?
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: Are you even listening to me, Mina?
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: Mm...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: And what is that? You've been flipping through it ever since you got back...
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: All my work logs since I started employment here.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: 1,372 assignment logs.
Accident rate: 0.7%.
Work completed above spec: 42%.
Three years, nine months...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Didn't realize it'd been so long already...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Didn't realize I'd done so much...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Ederson, that's not gonna happen.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Whatcha mean, Mina?
attributes.name: Ederson

attributes.content: Maybe I'll take you back to Columbia, maybe Columbia's still the same as when I left, but... I'm not gonna let any of what you worried about happen.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: But first of all, I need to see someone.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Hey! Mina! I was just gonna head to your dorm!
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: *huff* Kafka, I was looking for you.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Hear me out.
attributes.name: Pinecone / Kafka

attributes.content: Kafka, I know you're worried for me. I dunno how I should put this. / Mina, this is kind of awkward for me. I dunno where to even start.
attributes.name: Pinecone / Kafka

attributes.content: I know the truth already. The company's laying us off. I've seen it plenty of times myself. / I had no idea skateboarding was THIS MUCH fun until Aciddrop taught me how to kick it.
attributes.name: Pinecone / Kafka

attributes.content: Back when the big guy referred me here, all I wanted was a stable job. / I mean, kids who grew up on the streets NEED skateboards just like cops need crossbows and white-collar dumbasses need coffee.
attributes.name: Pinecone / Kafka

attributes.content: At first I could only handle assistant stuff, helping the Engineering crew while they did the big things... / So Aciddrop says the biggest skateboarding series is kicking off in two days, and Terra's best, ALL of Terra's best, are headin' there to grind wheels and make history.
attributes.name: Pinecone / Kafka

attributes.content: Rhodes has been a swell company, and a swell home. It's changed me in a lot of ways. / And you mark my words, for a newbie boarder like Kafka, this series'll be LIFE-CHANGING.
attributes.name: Pinecone / Kafka

attributes.content: It's been over three years, and I still forget my toolbag when I head out... / But see, that's the thing, I know you and I have an urgent Engineering assignment.
attributes.name: Pinecone / Kafka

attributes.content: But my job title kept on evolving anyway. In fact, I've led a number of projects and teams along the way. / It's important, we've gotta get to the Rhodes branch in Columbia as soon as we can...
attributes.name: Pinecone / Kafka

attributes.content: Kafka, you oughta look at me and see a grown adult, a grown worker! / We've gotta set up a local taskforce for Rhodes so if the future throws hands, we can catch 'em.
attributes.name: Pinecone / Kafka

attributes.content: I'm an adult who's not scared of leaving home, I'm a worker who's not scared of making a living in the barrens. / I've been tyin' myself into clown balloons the whole day about this, Mina, but I figure I'm gonna hafta ask ya to go on ahead while I, uh, yeah.
attributes.name: Pinecone / Kafka

attributes.content: I've made up my mind, I'm heading back to Columbia, I'm setting up my own work team! / But I'm gonna catch up with ya in a week at most!
attributes.name: Pinecone / Kafka

attributes.content: And if the right moment comes, maybe I can come back and help Rhodes Island through a sticky spot! / So just for the next coupla days, you're representin' the Rhodes Island Engineering Department solo!
attributes.name: Pinecone / Kafka

attributes.content: I know I can do this! / I know you can do this!
attributes.name: Pinecone / Kafka

attributes.content: Rhodes branch... Work team... Bwuh?
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Hold up, Mina, I think you might be on a different page than me?
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: This morning in the middle deck corridor, I heard you an' my colleague from Engineering talking...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: So I mentioned before, Rhodes Island is set to kick work on the local branch offices into high gear. You two are from Columbia, and you know your way around the whole Pioneer craze. Effectively, this is a long-term field mission...
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: Roger dodger.
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: So, you've gotta leave, Pinecone's gotta leave.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: When?
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: ASAP, really.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: Just like that?
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: Just like that.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: Look, I know about the skateboarding league thing—I'm a bit of a paragliding fan myself—and while I do wholly believe Pinecone could handle the early stages by herself...
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: How about this. You and Aciddrop skate off, and if you can win three points against her, I'll consider it essential that you participate in the upcoming series.
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: Also...
attributes.name: Engineering Operator A

attributes.content: Also, I hafta be the one to convince Pinecone.
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: So, did you take three points from her?
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: I—took—FOUR!
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: Jeez, I am SO sorry about this humongous misunderstanding, Mina, I musta been putting you through hell...
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: It—it's alright. Didn't go through nothin'...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Maybe I'm just not much of a thinker, I s'pose. Goin' on four years at Rhodes Island, and I never really stop to ask myself how I'm doing, except when I write letters to Dad...
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Got my hard hat, my nailgun, my toolbag, my nice soft pillow... I go to work, I eat, I sleep, I get my pay, sometimes I go up on the deck an' sing with everyone... I'd think my life never changes.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: But really, truth is... I changed long ago. Well, in a good way, a really good one.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Yannow, all this time I've known ya, and this might be the first time I've ever heard ya say so much in one breath...
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: Uhm. I—Is it?
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: Mmm... nah, don't matter.
attributes.name: Kafka

attributes.content: Kafka. I dunno how exactly we got to this point today, but I think, uh... it works out the same anyway?
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: I'm gonna take Ederson back to Columbia and register at the branch office. Then I wanna visit my hometown again for a bit, and see Dad... Maybe there's some people we could really need there.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: You can go report to the Engineering now. You convinced me.
attributes.name: Pinecone

attributes.content: ...I think you're the one convincin' me, Mina.
attributes.name: Kafka
